subcodes.first_line: O thou, upon whom be the salutations and praise from the Supreme Concourse, who hast sacrificed thyself in the path of God and art enraptured by the fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: التحیه و الثناء من الملا الاعلی علیک یا من استشهد فی سبیل الله و انجذب بنفحات
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
